data.title: NewRiver REIT Announces 3.0 Pence Dividend with Scrip Option
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

NewRiver REIT ( (GB:NRR) ) has provided an announcement.

NewRiver REIT has declared a dividend of 3.0 pence per share for the six months ending 30 September 2024. The dividend will be distributed as a Property Income Distribution on 28 January 2025 to shareholders on record as of 20 December 2024. Shareholders can opt to receive additional shares instead of cash dividends through the company’s scrip dividend scheme, which incurs no dealing charges or stamp duty. This scheme allows shareholders to enhance their investment in the company while providing flexibility in dividend reception.

More about NewRiver REIT

NewRiver REIT is a real estate investment trust focused on the retail and leisure sectors in the United Kingdom. The company primarily invests in shopping centers, retail parks, and community pubs, aiming to create value through active asset management and acquisitions.

YTD Price Performance: -0.47%

Average Trading Volume: 544,628

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: £295.4M

Revolution Beauty Group plc ( (GB:REVB) ) just unveiled an update.

Revolution Beauty Group plc announced that UBS Group AG’s trading book holdings in the company fell below the 5% threshold, exempting them from future reporting obligations. This change in holdings may impact the company’s stock market dynamics and stakeholder interests, as significant shifts in ownership can influence market perceptions and investor confidence.

data.title: Compagnie des Alpes and PRINOTH Join Forces for Electric Snow Groomers
data.description:
Compagnie des Alpes (FR:CDA) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Compagnie des Alpes (CDA) and PRINOTH have formed a partnership to industrialize the production of large-size electric snow groomers in the French Alps, aiming to significantly reduce carbon emissions in ski resort operations. This initiative marks a major step in CDA’s commitment to sustainability and promises to boost economic activity in the region with the establishment of a new assembly line by 2026. The collaboration will leverage PRINOTH’s expertise to develop a prototype based on their advanced snow grooming technology.

data.title: LondonMetric Offers Scrip Dividend Alternative for Shareholders
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

LondonMetric Property ( (GB:LMP) ) has provided an announcement.

LondonMetric Property PLC has announced a second quarterly interim dividend of 2.85 pence per share, offering shareholders the option to receive new ordinary shares instead of cash. The scrip calculation price has been set at 185.8 pence per share, based on the average market price over five business days starting from the ex-dividend date. This initiative provides shareholders with flexibility and potentially enhances shareholder value.

More about LondonMetric Property

LondonMetric Property PLC operates in the real estate sector, specializing in property investment and management. The company focuses on logistics and distribution properties, catering to the evolving needs of the modern supply chain and retail industries.

data.title: New Silkroutes Subsidiary Advances in Environmental Compliance
data.description:
New Silkroutes Group Limited (SG:BMT) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

New Silkroutes Group Limited’s subsidiary, Hequ Yuanyang Industrial Co., Ltd., has temporarily halted operations due to a government mandate aimed at protecting the Yellow River Basin’s ecological environment. The company has made significant progress in meeting environmental standards, investing RMB4.52 million in compliance efforts, and has secured creditor agreements to extend repayment periods during this shutdown. These advancements position HYI favorably for resuming operations once they receive clearance from local authorities.

data.title: BlackRock Reduces Stake in Bank of Ireland Below 6%
data.description:
Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Bank Of Ireland Group plc ( (DE:BIRG) ) has issued an update.

The Bank of Ireland Group PLC recently reported a change in the voting rights of major shareholder BlackRock, Inc. According to the notification, BlackRock’s voting rights have decreased to below 6%, indicating a reduction in its stake in the bank. This development could potentially impact the company’s shareholder structure and influence future corporate decisions, reflecting a shift in BlackRock’s investment strategy in the financial sector.

More about Bank Of Ireland Group plc

Bank of Ireland Group PLC operates in the financial services industry, providing a range of banking and insurance products primarily in Ireland. The company focuses on retail and commercial banking services, as well as wealth management solutions for its clients.
